releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Launch release of obsidian-radar plugin

Visualize your notes and ideas on a radar. Group them by topic, prioritize by proximity to the center, and keep focus when juggling multiple areas at once. Do not lose sight of items that might be hiding good opportunities.

Refer to repository README.md for full set of features released.
Starting at 0.9.0 so we can accomodate launch issues fixes before moving to 1.0.0.

Enjoy!
